label: Transparent lynx motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a Canada lynx / Eurasian lynx inspired head-and-shoulders motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One focused boreal forest lynx portrait cutout, tawny winter fur with pale snow-dusted ruff, black ear tufts, dark cheek markings, amber observant eyes, compact muzzle, subtle charcoal nose, natural fur detail, no body beyond shoulders.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding on all sides; do not crop ears, tufts, cheeks, or shoulders; symmetrical alert research-system emblem pose, crisp silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves tawny fur, black tufts, snow-pale highlights, soft boreal shadow, and sharp attentive expression.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest landscape, no decorative background, no second animal, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no green fringe, no cropped ear tufts.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lynx light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lynx", derived from an isolated boreal lynx motif with black ear tufts, tawny winter fur, pale snow ruff, charcoal markings, and amber focused eyes. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible focused research system.
Reference use: Use the lynx motif as the source of truth. Extract tawny fur, black ear tufts, snow-pale ruff, boreal pine shadow, amber eye focus, charcoal nose/markings, and cold snow neutrals. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lynx, Lynx, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: tawny fur primary, black tuft ink, snowfield background, boreal pine navigation accents, amber eye focus rings, frost grey muted surfaces, charcoal markings, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: focused research product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a clear humanist sans with compact research headings and a Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, observations, table numerals, and dense research workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 研究, 検索, 観測, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, research timeline, line chart, bar chart, observation table, evidence table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, focused boreal research dashboard, snowfield paper surfaces, tawny primary actions, boreal pine active navigation and status accents, black tuft ink borders, subtle fine fur and snow-grain texture, sharp attentive hierarchy, compact data density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lynx", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lynx dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lynx". It must feel like the same focused research system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from an isolated boreal lynx motif with black ear tufts, tawny winter fur, pale snow ruff, charcoal markings, and amber focused eyes.
Reference use: Preserve tawny primary controls, boreal pine navigation and status accents, snow/frost typography guidance, black tuft ink borders, amber eye focus rings, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lynx, Dark Mode, Lynx, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest black ear tuft background, warm charcoal panels, tawny fur primary, amber eye focus highlights, boreal pine accents, frost grey text, snow-muted borders, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: focused research product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a clear humanist sans with compact research headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, observations, table numerals, and dense research workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 研究, 検索, 観測, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, research timeline, line chart, bar chart, observation table, evidence table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from black ear tufts and charcoal facial markings, elevated panels in warm boreal charcoal, frost-grey foreground text, tawny primary actions, amber focus rings, pine active navigation and success/status accents, subtle fine fur and snow-grain overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lynx", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
